meta.source: CMS Medicare Physician Fee Schedule + demo payer assumptions
meta.disclaimer: Prototype reference only. Always validate rates and coding policy with current payer contracts and certified coders.

codes.title: Office/outpatient visit, established patient, low complexity
codes.documentationNeeded: History, medically appropriate exam, low complexity MDM or qualifying time.
codes.complianceNotes: Do not level up solely for revenue; code must match documented complexity/time.

codes.title: Office/outpatient visit, established patient, moderate complexity
codes.documentationNeeded: Moderate MDM elements or qualifying total time documented.
codes.complianceNotes: Requires clear evidence of moderate complexity work.

codes.title: Smoking and tobacco cessation counseling visit, intermediate
codes.documentationNeeded: Tobacco use status, counseling duration, counseling content.
codes.complianceNotes: Counseling must be medically appropriate and time-based criteria met.

codes.title: Advance care planning, first 30 minutes
codes.documentationNeeded: Voluntary discussion details, participants, total time spent.
codes.complianceNotes: Use only when true ACP discussion occurs and time requirement is met.

codes.title: Chronic care management services, 20 minutes
codes.documentationNeeded: Two or more chronic conditions, consent, monthly time log, care plan.
codes.complianceNotes: Monthly CCM requirements must be satisfied.

codes.title: Annual wellness visit, subsequent
codes.documentationNeeded: Required AWV components, personalized prevention plan, interval timing.

codes.title: Annual depression screening, 15 minutes
codes.documentationNeeded: Validated screening instrument used and documented score/results.

codes.title: Electrocardiogram with interpretation and report
codes.documentationNeeded: Tracing performed, interpretation, and signed report.
codes.complianceNotes: Medical necessity and report are required.

codes.title: Influenza vaccine, quadrivalent, preservative free
codes.documentationNeeded: Vaccine lot, route, dose, counseling, consent.
codes.complianceNotes: Reimbursement often paired with administration code.

codes.title: Immunization administration, first vaccine/toxoid
codes.documentationNeeded: Administration details and counseling documentation per payer policy.
codes.complianceNotes: Pair with correct vaccine product code.
